properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Our battlegrounds changing From darkness to light Soldiers of Christ Endured with might, Soldiers of Christ Endured with might

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For the crown over yonder And gown that we'll wear Is the price of the victory In keeping our testimony We’re written epistles, read of all men Where the glory of Christ Reflect the walk we thread

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In our journey as Bride, we walk with pride Trimming our lamps, ‘till the groom arrives Trimming our lamps, for He cometh nigh

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For the crown over yonder And the gown that we'll wear Is the price of the victory In keeping our testimony That we bear the light Throughout the fight Let’s keep burning the light In our life, it always shines

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: For the time is near So ready yourself, come on now So, count yourself worthy No time to be sorry For when we step on the clouds Hearing our names read aloud It's a sign that it’s almost home time

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: For the crown over yonder And the gown that we'll wear Is the price of the victory In keeping our testimony We’re written epistles Read of all men Where the glory of Christ Reflect the walk we thread
